fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKDocumentXpsOptions` configures the parameters used when generating an XPS
(XML Paper Specification) document. Pass an instance of this struct to the
`SKDocument.CreateXps` overload that accepts options.

## Examples

```csharp
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions
{
    DPI = 300,
    AllowNoPngs = false,
};
using var stream = File.OpenWrite("output.xps");
using var document = SKDocument.CreateXps(stream, options);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides options for creating an XPS document with <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocument" />.
Gets or sets a value indicating whether the XPS document may be created without embedding PNG images.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> to allow creation even when PNG images cannot be embedded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the dots-per-inch resolution used for the XPS document.
fields.value: The DPI value for the document. The default value is 72.

params.obj: The instance to compare with the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
